## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the issue if there is one. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `./scripts/lint-skills.sh` passes (frontmatter contract, name/folder match, <500-line body)
- [ ] `./scripts/check-links.sh` passes (every referenced file exists)
- [ ] New/changed skill follows [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md): third-person description with trigger phrases, rules explain the *why*
- [ ] If this changes a skill's behavior: bumped its `metadata.version` in `SKILL.md`
- [ ] Added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] If the skill executes code or reads/writes outside its folder: documented in `SECURITY.md`'s scope table
- [ ] New skill added to the README skills table under the right theme
